reviews.review_description: Re-Lights my inner child.. well done guys.
Worth the money, entertaining for a few hours. Great for kids
Beautiful music  I would like to hear it in a longer versions :)
What a beautiful game. These developers are well known here for creating true 3D depth games with awesome cute graphics. Will always download a game they make. Truly immersive this one

I'd love for it to be a little longer though. More things to experience and maybe even have things happen a bit different if you interact with them again.

Overall, it's great!

reviews.review_title: Eye candy for sure, but glitchy for me
reviews.review_description: Looks nice. My grandkids love it. However, each and every time we run it, we are forced to watch some segments twice before being able to move on. Specifically, the pirate ship battle MUST be watched twice every time to progress. My phone is a Galaxy S8+

reviews.review_title: Really nice, more of a demo than a game
reviews.review_description:
The graphics and animations of this game are beautiful, and the first time you see them, you will be stunned how nice it is. I used the new motion controller to play, but honestly the game would be just as nice without it's use. 
There are several patterns to "discover", and each triggers a unique event, but after 10 minutes or so, you've seen the whole thing and that's about it. Still, its free and gorgeous so you really should try it out!
This is a wonderful experience. Highly recommended
It's relaxing and cute. Not much to do yet, but I will check it out again when there are updates. Love the graphics/scenery. Can we please have more animals that hang out with us?? Too cute!
A brilliant app, simple to use, comfortable and great to show to friends.
Isn't there supposed to be  something other than standing stationary near a campfire and Christmas tree?
Not bad when you’re bored and have 10 minutes to spare. Fun to see what happens and then delete it after 5-10 minutes 😂
I spent 10$ on this game and I left and went back every thing i bought was gone

developer_response.body: Hi glato19owo, the customer support team can help you with this. Please submit a ticket here: https://tickets.oculusvr.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: Good game I just wish you could move around and explore also.
I like the experience in this game keep it up

developer_response.body: Hey Ryanguz04, thanks for the kind words, glad to hear you enjoyed A Night Sky!

reviews.review_description: its short but really interesting cool graphics
Fun experience with several options. Good graphics
Relaxing. Fun to interact with. Undecided if I would pay for the additional packs.

You will absolutely love this app/game, the visual’s in it are done right. I have tested it on the young and the old and they all say the same thing It’s Fantastic and fun please developers make a second one or ad to this one please.
Tho the Big Dipper keeps shooting me so👎🏼
